tasks.title: Create Canonical Schema Contracts
tasks.instruction: Implement the canonical shared schema surface required by SPEC.md. Move Repository-owned data, snapshot, method payload, method result, generic entity remote, command acknowledgement, and runtime event contract ownership under packages/core/src/schemas. Decompose packages/core/src/airport/runtime.ts so it is no longer the canonical schema surface. Keep the work strict: no passthrough payloads, no compatibility aliases, and no fallback parser layers.

tasks.title: Verify Canonical Schema Contracts
tasks.instruction: Verify that shared schemas are canonical under packages/core/src/schemas and that Repository, EntityRemote, RuntimeEvents, and schema barrel exports are strict and browser-safe. Confirm airport/runtime no longer owns entity, method, or event schemas. Run focused schema, type, and package checks, and record any remaining gaps in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Make Repository Domain Authoritative
tasks.instruction: Refactor Repository around the canonical schemas. Repository.ts remains the daemon-authoritative entity for repository identity, snapshots, issue queries, add/register, and mission-start source commands. Repositories.ts remains the collection authority. Remove RepositorySchema.ts and RepositoryRemote.ts as contract owners, remove duplicate validation that obscures the boundary, and keep one strict validation point per daemon-callable method.

tasks.title: Verify Repository Domain Authority
tasks.instruction: Verify Repository and Repositories own only their intended domain and collection responsibilities. Confirm Repository methods import canonical schemas only, return schema-validated JSON-safe values, reject invalid payloads, and keep add/register plus mission-start behavior aligned with SPEC.md. Run focused Repository tests and record remaining gaps in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Replace Daemon Entity Dispatch
tasks.instruction: Replace dynamic daemon entity dispatch with explicit per-entity dispatchers, starting with Repository. Remove ENTITY_MODELS-style registry behavior, class/prototype probing, arbitrary method string execution, and generic result normalization. Each Repository query and command handler must parse payloads, resolve instances explicitly when required, execute the known method, parse the result, and fail loudly for unknown entities or methods. Bump PROTOCOL_VERSION for the changed daemon RPC contract.

tasks.title: Verify Explicit Daemon Entity Dispatch
tasks.instruction: Verify daemon entity dispatch is explicit and strict. Confirm unknown entities, unknown methods, invalid payloads, invalid results, missing instances, and missing daemon context fail loudly. Confirm Repository.find, Repository.add, Repository.read, listIssues, getIssue, startMissionFromIssue, and startMissionFromBrief route through explicit handlers. Run daemon protocol and entity dispatch tests and record remaining gaps in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Clean Airport Repository Mirror
tasks.instruction: Refactor the Airport Repository client mirror and generic remote gateways around the canonical schema surface. Browser Repository methods must import schemas from @flying-pillow/mission-core/schemas, call generic query and command remotes, parse source results, and expose component-facing methods. Remove deep entity remote imports, route-local Repository issue and mission remotes, manual payload composition from components, and command projection assumptions.

tasks.title: Verify Airport Repository Mirror
tasks.instruction: Verify Airport web reaches Repository behavior only through mirrored entity methods and generic remotes. Confirm browser-reachable code has no deep entities/*Remote* imports, no daemon/node imports, and no route-local issue or mission remotes for Repository behavior. Run focused web dispatch and Repository mirror tests and record remaining gaps in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Wire SSE Projection Ownership
tasks.instruction: Align command results and projection updates with SPEC.md. Commands must return source acknowledgement or source-local results, while cross-entity state changes are projected through daemon SSE event envelopes validated by shared RuntimeEvents schemas. Update the Repository mission-start flow and client reconciliation so mission, workflow, task, artifact, and session changes are not treated as command response projections.

tasks.title: Verify SSE Projection Ownership
tasks.instruction: Verify source commands no longer reconcile broad cross-entity projections. Confirm mission-start and task or mission side effects are represented by daemon SSE projection events and client mirror reconciliation. Check event envelope schema validation, command acknowledgement parsing, and manual Repository/Mission flows. Record remaining gaps in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Tighten Exports And Remove Transitional Layers
tasks.instruction: Complete the Repository-first architecture cleanup by tightening packages/core package exports to the minimal stable entrypoints, removing wildcard and deep remote exports, deleting transitional route-local remotes and compatibility shims, reducing DaemonGateway to non-entity infrastructure, and replacing remaining manual parsers with shared schemas where this mission's Repository-first scope requires it.

tasks.title: Verify Exports And Removed Transitional Layers
tasks.instruction: Verify the final Repository-first implementation has minimal stable package exports, no wildcard exports, no public deep entity remote exports, no airport/runtime schema dependency from browser code, no route-specific Repository remotes, and no fallback, compatibility, alias, or normalization layer left in the target path. Run package, web, build, and focused import-boundary checks, then record final evidence in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Implement GitHub Repository Source Entity
tasks.instruction: Make the Airport GitHub repositories functionality use a first-class GitHubRepository source entity backed by the repository platform adapter boundary. GitHubRepository.find and GitHubRepository.clone must route through generic entity query/command remotes and explicit daemon handlers. Backend GitHubRepository delegates provider operations through RepositoryPlatformAdapter or its factory, not direct GitHub-specific implementation calls. Clone/import returns a local RepositorySnapshot after registration.

tasks.title: Verify GitHub Repository Source Entity
tasks.instruction: Verify explicit daemon handlers for GitHubRepository.find and GitHubRepository.clone, canonical schemas under @flying-pillow/mission-core/schemas, provider access through RepositoryPlatformAdapter, no direct Airport route/component GitHub CLI calls, and no control.github.repositories.list dependency in the active UI path. Append evidence to 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Create Canonical Mission Schema Contracts
tasks.instruction: Make packages/core/src/schemas/Mission.ts the canonical shared contract owner for the Mission entity. Mission identity, snapshot, child projection, action, document, worktree, command payload, query payload, result, and acknowledgement schemas must live under the canonical schema surface. Deep MissionRemoteContract stops being the target contract owner. Keep schemas strict and browser-safe.

tasks.title: Verify Canonical Mission Schema Contracts
tasks.instruction: Verify packages/core/src/schemas/Mission.ts owns Mission identity, snapshot, child projection, method payload, method result, and acknowledgement schemas. Confirm schemas are strict, schema barrel exports are browser-safe, Airport code imports Mission contracts from @flying-pillow/mission-core/schemas, and deep MissionRemoteContract is no longer the target schema owner. Record evidence in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Make Mission Daemon Authoritative
tasks.instruction: Move daemon-callable Mission behavior behind the Mission entity boundary or focused Mission collaborators instead of keeping MissionRemote as a parallel contract owner. Mission must resolve repository-scoped mission instances explicitly, load and dispose runtime resources through a focused collaborator, execute source methods, return strict JSON-safe values, and parse source results before returning.

tasks.title: Verify Mission Daemon Authority
tasks.instruction: Verify Mission source methods use canonical schemas, resolve mission instances explicitly, dispose runtime resources, fail loudly for missing missions and invalid payloads, and return acknowledgements or source-local results rather than global projection snapshots. Record focused test output and boundary notes in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Route Mission Through Explicit Dispatch
tasks.instruction: Add explicit Mission query and command handlers to daemon generic entity dispatch. Mission read, readControl, listActions, readDocument, readWorktree, command, taskCommand, sessionCommand, executeAction, and writeDocument must route through known handlers that parse payloads before execution and results after execution. Bump PROTOCOL_VERSION when daemon RPC behavior changes.

tasks.title: Verify Mission Explicit Dispatch
tasks.instruction: Verify daemon dispatch has explicit Mission query and command handlers, payload/result parsing is method-specific, missing context and unknown methods fail loudly, command results parse as acknowledgements or source-local results, and PROTOCOL_VERSION is bumped when required. Record dispatch test output and static handler coverage in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Clean Airport Mission Mirror
tasks.instruction: Make the Airport Mission mirror the component-facing owner of Mission request-response behavior through generic entity remotes. Mission read/control/action/document/worktree behavior must go through Mission entity methods and generic query/command remotes. Mission, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession mirrors expose domain-shaped methods while components stop composing backend payloads or calling route-local Mission APIs directly.

tasks.title: Verify Airport Mission Mirror
tasks.instruction: Verify Airport components reach Mission behavior through Mission and child entity mirrors, Mission transports use generic entity query/command remotes, browser code imports canonical schemas only, and task/session/artifact methods route through the owning Mission mirror until those children become source entities. Record focused web tests and caller scans in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Wire Mission Projections And Remove Runtime Routes
tasks.instruction: Complete the Mission migration by separating Mission projection updates from command responses and removing request-response runtime routes that duplicate entity remotes. Mission, Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession projection events must be validated with shared schemas and reconcile client mirrors. Terminal/session streaming remains only where streaming transport is required.

tasks.title: Verify Mission Projections And Runtime Route Cleanup
tasks.instruction: Verify Mission command responses are acknowledgements or source-local results, Mission projection events validate typed payloads, client mirrors reconcile Mission/Stage/Task/Artifact/AgentSession updates from SSE or query refreshes, duplicate request-response runtime routes are gone or reduced, and terminal/socket routes are retained only for stream transport. Record final Mission-migration validation in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Create Child Entity Command Contracts
tasks.instruction: Make Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession first-class commandable entity contracts at the shared schema and daemon dispatch boundary. Introduce dedicated canonical schema modules for Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession under packages/core/src/schemas/. Each child module owns that entity's identity payload, typed entity reference, snapshot or projection contract, command list snapshot, executeCommand payload/result schemas, acknowledgement schema, and remote payload/result schema maps. Introduce shared EntityCommandDescriptor and EntityCommandListSnapshot primitives in EntityRemote. Update Mission.ts to compose child schemas from the child modules instead of owning the child command contracts itself. Preserve Mission as internal aggregate authority while exposing child entity contracts externally.

tasks.title: Verify Child Entity Command Contracts
tasks.instruction: Verify Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession have dedicated canonical schema modules under packages/core/src/schemas/. Each child module must own strict schemas for identity, typed reference, snapshot or projection where needed, listCommands, executeCommand, acknowledgements, remote payload/result maps, and command descriptors. Confirm schemas are exported through @flying-pillow/mission-core/schemas, browser-safe, and do not require Airport actionbar filtering context. Confirm Mission.ts composes child schemas from child modules instead of owning child command contracts itself. Record evidence in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Route Child Entity Commands Through Dispatch
tasks.instruction: Add explicit daemon handlers for Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession command discovery and execution. Handlers resolve the owning Mission aggregate internally, parse payloads before execution, parse results after execution, and return entity command acknowledgements or direct source-local results without exposing Mission-wide action filtering as the public contract.

tasks.title: Verify Child Entity Dispatch
tasks.instruction: Verify daemon dispatch has explicit handlers for Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession query and command methods. Confirm method-specific parsing, loud missing mission or child failures, entity-scoped command lists, and Mission as the internal aggregate authority. Record evidence in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Refactor Airport Actionbar To Entity Commands
tasks.instruction: Replace scoped actionbar/context filtering with an entity-agnostic actionbar that consumes commandable entity mirrors. Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession browser mirrors must expose listCommands and executeCommand; Actionbar receives an entity instance and renders returned commands. Remove scope, stageId, taskId, artifactPath, and sessionId actionbar props and remove local target filtering.

tasks.title: Verify Entity Command Actionbar
tasks.instruction: Verify Actionbar accepts commandable entities only, renders entity-returned commands without local domain filtering, and no active Airport component passes scope, taskId, artifactPath, or sessionId for action discovery. Confirm Task, Artifact, AgentSession, Stage, and Mission mirrors own their command access methods. Record evidence in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: Wire Child Entity Projections
tasks.instruction: Complete the clean child-entity architecture by routing projection updates to Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession mirrors by entity reference. Typed projection events identify Mission, Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession references and validated snapshots; client mirrors reconcile targeted child updates without command response projections or Mission-wide action filtering.

tasks.title: Verify Child Entity Projections
tasks.instruction: Verify RuntimeEvents schemas include typed child entity projection payloads, daemon forwarding validates those payloads, client mirrors reconcile Stage, Task, Artifact, and AgentSession updates by reference, command availability refreshes through entity mirrors, and terminal stream transport remains separate. Record evidence in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/VERIFY.md.

tasks.title: PRD From Brief
tasks.instruction: Use BRIEF.md as the canonical intake context. Rewrite or enrich PRD.md so it clearly states the problem, the target outcome, the constraints, and the success criteria for this mission. Only modify PRD.md in this task. Do not create or edit SPEC.md, implementation files, verification files, or delivery artifacts. Do not create application code in this task.

tasks.title: Draft Spec
tasks.instruction: Read PRD.md and define the technical target in SPEC.md. The specification must describe the intended design, the key boundaries, and the concrete files that will change. Only modify SPEC.md in this task. Do not create implementation code or verification evidence in this task.

tasks.title: Plan Implementation And Verification
tasks.instruction: Read SPEC.md and turn it into an execution ledger. Create paired markdown task files under 03-IMPLEMENTATION/tasks for each implementation slice: one task for building the slice and a second verification task for testing or validating that same slice. Name the verification task with the "-verify.md" suffix, keep both tasks in 03-IMPLEMENTATION/tasks, and make the verification task depend on its implementation task. The verification task must focus on tests and validation rather than feature creation. Do not create application code in this planning task. Do not modify delivery artifacts.

tasks.title: Debrief
tasks.instruction:
Run mission-level validation and update AUDIT.md.

Separate mission regressions from baseline failures. Record risks and smallest follow-ups.

Use the product artifacts in this mission folder as the canonical context boundary.
